reviews.review_description:
Never has fighting climate change been such a blast as in this wild co-op shooter! 
And if you understand German you can even learn without much effort how to reduce the carbon footprint while taking down the E.v.i.l. drones :-D

The game took me 29 minutes to complete, so it's very short but fun. It is in German and understanding the language is probably a must.  I could see this being a fun educational app about climate change that kids particularly would enjoy, but as an adult I had a blast. Well done, team!
